phrases.intent_en: Is ice rink Davos open for skating
phrases.cultural_note: Short yes/no answers are standard for operational questions; avoid additional explanations.

phrases.intent_en: Where is Schatzalp funicular valley booth
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Schalter für die Schatzalp-Bahn?
phrases.cultural_note: Schalter is the local term for ticket booth; avoid misleading directions like 'behind hotels'.

phrases.intent_en: Where to store skis at hotel concierge
phrases.text_local: Wie komme ich zur Skiaufbewahrung im Hotel?
phrases.cultural_note: Hotel concierge services are typically handled at reception; avoid inventing storage locations.

phrases.intent_en: Which bus serves Jakobshorn cable car
phrases.cultural_note: Bus lines in Davos use simple numbering; avoid route details not supported by context.

phrases.intent_en: How to reach Kongresszentrum on foot
phrases.text_local: Wie komme ich zu Fuß zum Kongresszentrum?
phrases.cultural_note: Signage is the standard cue for pedestrian navigation in public areas; avoid micro-directions.

likely_response.local: Gehen Sie geradeaus die Promenade entlang.
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight ahead along the promenade.

responses.english: Go straight ahead along the promenade.
responses.french: Gehen Sie geradeaus die Promenade entlang.
